# PERF-119 positive: consecutive appends to the same slice
lang: go
file: PERF-119-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "fmt"

func Build(parts []string) []string {
	var out []string
	out = append(out, "a")
	out = append(out, "b")
	out = append(out, "c")
	return out
}

func _() {
	out := Build(nil)
	fmt.Println(out)
}
